strong_matches: Built with the language models (Cario LLM chat in production, Wysa annotation platform serving AI team) and built for the language models (AgenticSearch agentic pipeline with provider routing/fallback + 150+ tests)
Full-stack zero-to-one in TypeScript (cf-ai-research-scout: AI agent + WebSocket streaming on Cloudflare) and React/Electron/FastAPI (Sonare hackathon ship)
Production multi-tenant SaaS ownership at Wysa with measurable craft (code reviews, integration tests, JS->TS migration, VAPT remediation)

revisions.summary: Added third Wysa experience bullet (technical POC + cross-functional stakeholder partnership + KT for new devs) for Composio human/trust framing; split Sonare bullet into two (zero-to-one integration + offline FastAPI/Electron backend) to fill bottom whitespace.
